name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regular Virtualization Administration
notes: This Building Block defines Regular Virtual Environment Administration Activity such as machines management, and rights management.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Access Key Creation for Another User (AWS)
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Change To AWS Trail Logging Configurations
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regular Virtualization Administration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Role Assigned to a Resource with Managed Identity (Azure)
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Created, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Deleted, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Restarted, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Started, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Stopped, BB:CategoryDefinition: Cloud Object Shared (O365), BB:CategoryDefinition: User Role Assign Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Configuration Change, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Default Policy Version Modification (AWS), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Default Policy Creation (AWS), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Access Key Creation for Another User (AWS), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Role Assigned to a Resource with Managed Identity (Azure), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Change To AWS Trail Logging Configurations
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regular Virtualization Administration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Created, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Deleted, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Restarted, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Started, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Stopped, BB:CategoryDefinition: Cloud Object Shared (O365), BB:CategoryDefinition: User Role Assign Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Configuration Change, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Default Policy Version Modification (AWS), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Default Policy Creation (AWS), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Access Key Creation for Another User (AWS), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Role Assigned to a Resource with Managed Identity (Azure), BB:BehaviorDefinition: Change To AWS Trail Logging Configurations
